name: breaking-static-graph
paperTitle: Breaking the Static Graph: Context-Aware Traversal for Knowledge Graphs
content:
## Introduction

Graph edges aren't static; context changes their relevance. Model traversal as attention-weighted routing based on query context. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Graph edges aren't static; context changes their relevance. Model traversal as attention-weighted routing based on query context.

```
Input

  │   └─ Main computation
  │
  ├─→ [Processing Stage 2]
  │   └─ Refinement
  │
  └─→ Output
```
